# requirements.txt - Works for all Python versions

# Core LLM dependencies
openai>=1.0.0
anthropic>=0.18.0
groq>=0.4.0
mistralai>=0.1.0
google-generativeai>=0.3.0

# Document processing
pypdf>=3.0.0
tiktoken>=0.5.0
PyPDF2>=3.0.0
python-docx>=1.0.0

# UI and utilities
ipywidgets>=7.7.0

# LangChain and its core dependencies
langchain>=0.3.0
langchain-community>=0.3.0
langchain-core>=0.3.0

# LangChain integrations for your LLM providers
langchain-openai>=0.2.0
langchain-anthropic>=0.2.0
langchain-google-genai>=0.1.0

# Python version specific (pip handles this automatically)
numpy>=1.26.0,<2.0.0; python_version < '3.13'
numpy>=2.0.0,<3.0.0; python_version >= '3.13'
